title: hieracium gigantellum subsp. orthocladum
intro: Hieracium gigantellum subsp. orthocladum, also known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. Some herbal preparations of Hawkweed have been used to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and eczema, due to its potential health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Additionally, Hawkweed has been used in herbal teas and infusions to support immune function and overall well-being.
